allow: PowerShell(try { \(Get-Command pnpm -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { Write-Output "pnpm not found" }; try { \(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { Write-Output "npm not found" }; try { \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { Write-Output "node not found" }; try { \(Get-Command npx -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { Write-Output "npx not found" })

PowerShell(try { \(Get-Command pnpm -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { "pnpm not found" }; try { \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { "node not found" }; try { \(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { "npm not found" })
